raw_text: gilbert corbella 22 of january of 1988 contact information: e-mail: gilbertcorbella@hotmail.com mobiles +34-629 355 303 / +48-889 582 632 address: c/ cantias 4, 2-izq, 41007, seville (spain) dni: 47883762q linkedin: es.linkedin.com/in/gilbertcorbella aeronautical & aerospace engineer with experience at eads airbus. knowledge in the field of quality & lean. involved in continuous improvement strategies. international experiences in multicultural and multifunctional teams. academic information 2006-2011 master in aeronautical & aerospace engineering universitat politécnica de catalunya barcelona - specializations: 1.space vehicles & 2. propulsion systems. etseiat 2010-2011 master in aeronautical & aerospace engineering (erasmus) warsaw university of technology warsaw - master thesis: dynamic absorption system [das]. il work experience 2012-current lean change agent (intern) eads airbus military seville - conducted and developed the telecom system of the probe. 2010 project dreamglider [the next hang glider generation]. universitat politécnica de catalunya barcelona (6 months) - developed the propulsion system, electrics 4 electronics systems. - responsible for budget and economical feasibility of the project. 2004-2010 private/support teacher for students at high school and university. universitat politécnica de catalunya barcelona 2007 scholarship granted to best students of 2006 in catalonia. caixa manresa catalonia interests / more about me health, sport activities, martial arts. enthusiasm and willingness to learn. residence change availability. travelling, culture, languages, people. team orientation. driving license b1 and own vehicle. space, aviation, science research, technology. customer-focused service. 100% travel availability. last update : september 2012 1/1
